case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JEFFREY JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JEFFREY $8,694.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,244.74 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,229.24, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $106.18 DUE ON THE 6TH OF EACH MONTH..........SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH............ NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED DEC-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JEFFREY

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JEFFREY DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-29-2012
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JEFFREY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
